---
title: "Todo List"
subtitle: "Frontend"
description: "Todo list app built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, allowing users to create, organize, and manage tasks within projects."
author: Abdullah Zeeshan
date: 2024-09-03
image: ../utils/todo-list.png
categories:
  - JavaScript (ES6)
  - Webpack
  - OOP
  - SOLID Principles
reading-time: true
toc: true
fig-align: center
fig-cap-location: bottom
---

<span class="listing-btn-group">
<a href="https://4bdullah7eeshan.github.io/todo-list/" class="btn" role="button">{{< fa globe >}} Live</a> 
<a href="https://github.com/4bdullah7eeshan/todo-list" class="btn" role="button">{{< iconify fa github >}} Source Code</a>
</span>
